examples: I credit his queerness to his solitude.
On her once familiar street, as in any unused channel, an unfamiliar queerness had silted up.
They are queer folk, and it's best that they marry their Cousins and keep their queerness to themselves.
It was like living in a John Waters film, where all the freaks got center stage and were made to relish their queerness and triumph in their status as outsiders.
